meaning: n.(尤指对反政府政治犯的)特赦
examples: Critics say this amounts to a backdoor amnesty for illegal aliens.
Activists who were involved in crimes of violence will not automatically be granted amnesty.
In order to raise revenue, the federal government planned a tax amnesty program that allows tax delinquents to pay all owed tax without added financial penalty.
She and another woman were convicted in 2005 of tax evasion but were released under an amnesty.
Putin did not say whether Khodorkovsky and Lebedev would be included in the amnesty.
